particulars.description: By way of first legal mortgage, the borrower’s right, title and interest as at the date of this deed and thereafter in or to the freehold property known as the potting shed, broadgates, hexham, NE46 1QN which is registered at the land registry with title numbers ND209064 and ND215396 and as more particularly shown edged red on the plan.

persons_entitled.name: Tier One Capital Fm Limited, as Security Trustee

particulars.description: By way of first charge the following properties:. 1. the freehold property known as 1 the old church, hexham, NE46 1NG which is registered at the land registry with title number ND195233;. 2. the freehold property known as property adjoining 3A old church, hexham which is registered at the land registry with title number ND104854;. 3. the freehold property known as land at 1-2 beaumont street, hexham, NE46 3LZ which is registered at the land registry with title number ND193322;. 4. the freehold property known as 1-2 beaumont street, hexham, NE46 3LZ which is registered at the land registry with title number ND193323; and. 5. the freehold property known as 3 beaumont street, hexham, NE46 3LZ which is registered at the land registry with title number ND96071.. And all properties (whether registered or unregistered) at the date of this debenture or thereafter owned by the borrower or in which the borrower holds any interest. By way of first fixed charge, the borrower's present and future patents, trademarks, service marks, trade names, designs, copyrights, inventions, topographical or similar rights, confidential information and know-how and any interest in any of these rights, whether or not registered.

persons_entitled.name: Tier One Capital Fm Limited, as Security Trustee
